title: Cos trading
author: Ok_Temperature_370
selftext: Hi everyone at the moment I am using an Ai trading app. There is NO loss in this app. You can easily double your money and with the commission from referrals you get you can make even more money. However there is only one risk to this app and if you would like to know what that is and are interested please message me. I know it seems like a scam but I can answer any questions you may have and can help you with the process.
